sglang.title: feat: add request queued timeout
sglang.author: zhooooong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add a timeout for queued requests.
Modifications
Add a new environment variable SGLANG_QUEUED_TIMEOUT_MS. In the scheduler, abort requests that have exceeded the waiting queue timeout before making a new inference batch.
Accuracy Tests
server cmd:
export SGLANG_QUEUED_TIMEOUT_MS=1  # 1ms

sglang.title: Add clear error message when OOM with symmetric memory
sglang.author: nvcastet
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
While using NCCL symmetric memory (--enable-symm-mem), we have been having random issues (segfaults, TMA errors). The root-caused is that we are failing allocating symmetric memory and keep the program running with a garbage ptr.
This PR outputs a correct OOM message and also tells pytorc

sglang.title: fix: ci failure monitor reorganization
sglang.author: dougyster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The main goal of these new features is to provide more support for early detection of runner-level failures and file-level failures. We collapse the job level failures so that file level failures are surfaced immediately. We also add support for detecting file level failures from timeouts

sglang.title: Increase 5090 test parallelism from 4 to 8
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Increase max-parallel from 4 to 8 for stage-b-test-small-1-gpu-5090.
16 runners available but only 4 jobs ran concurrently, causing 2+ hour queue waits. After the flashinfer fix (#16826), 5090 tests are mostly passing (8/8 on runs 21041416426 and 21030712280).

sglang.author: liusy58
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Mooncake's batch_transfer_sync_write does not guarantee that data has been written to the remote memory upon return. As a result, the receiver may read initial values (e.g., output_id=0)
This PR adds SGLANG_SEND_AUX_TCP to allow transferring small metadata via TCP, ensuring that the data

sglang.author: harvenstar

vllm.title: [EPLB][BugFix]Possible deadlock fix
vllm.author: ilmarkov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes possible deadlock in async EPLB.
The deadlock might happen when all ep group ranks enter move_to_workspace but only some of them manage to acquire the buffer_lock. It might happen because async worker releases the lock AFTER it sets ep_buffer_ready. It can lead to a situation when some

vllm.title: [LoRA] Update LoRA expand kernel heuristic
vllm.author: xyang16
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR is to update the LoRA expand kernel heuristic.

During profiling we found qkv_proj expand kernel takes more time than shrink kernel. We found it's because layers like QKVParallelLinearWithLoRA has num_slices > 1, N (output_size) is smaller in each slice. Therefore, we can set smaller

Purpose
When debugging responsesAPI with enable_response_messages, we notice a token - message discrepancy as the last stop_str token is omitted. Adding it in doesn't affect parsing, since reasoning / tool call parsing should ignore those tokens.
